content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî after iter-015 (for the iter-016 plan agent)

## Closest-to-completion / highest-leverage target
- **`sheafOf.carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` (OcOfD.lean L1139) ‚Äî the BINDING leaf.** Dispatch a dedicated
  `mathlib-build`/`prove` lane. Closing it cascades the entire S3 chain: `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (S-B)
  ‚Üí `cokernel_skyscraper_hom` (S-C) ‚Üí `cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` (S-D); the top-level iso
  `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` is ALREADY wired (`asIso`) and lands automatically.
  - Content: `stalk (carrierSheaf D) P.point ‚âÖ ModuleCat.of kbar (orderAtPSubmodule D P)`. The codomain
    `orderAtPSubmodule` is PROVEN axiom-clean this iter ‚Äî the target is concrete. ~200‚Äì400 LOC: filtered
    colimit of section submodules ‚Üí union inside `K(C)` (restriction maps are the identity) ‚Üí smooth-curve
    constraint collapse to the single prime `P`. NO Mathlib carrier-stalk API (build from scratch).
  - **BLOCKER PREP (must-do before/with the body):** `CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val` is **deprecated** and
    appears in this stub's type (L1142) and in `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar`'s (L1161). It is a harmless
    warning on a `sorry` body but **will become an error when the body is filled** ‚Äî migrate to
    `ObjectProperty.obj` in the type first. (lean-auditor iter-015 major #5.)
  - The lvb-checker flagged the chapter is light on the colimit-of-submodules-= union mechanical step ‚Äî
    consider a short blueprint-writer touch on `lem:carrierSheaf_stalk_eq_fractionalIdeal` to add that
    detail before the prover starts.

## Promising / ready but downstream of the binding leaf
- `cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` is structurally ready once S-C exists: `isIso_of_stalkFunctor_map_iso`
  with the away-from-P half already PROVEN (`carrierPresheaf_le_hom_app_isIso_of_not_mem`) + at-P residue
  iso (S-B). Do NOT assign before `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` + `cokernel_skyscraper_hom` land ‚Äî it cannot
  evaluate the stalk maps of a `sorry` morphism.
- **Corner bridge `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` (L1293) + the 2 `sheafOf_ses_single_add` corners**
  (L1437/1443) form a SEPARATE small lane: land the bridge (Hartshorne II.6.3A, regular fns = order-‚â•0
  everywhere on the normal curve), then wire both corners via the recipe already recorded inline
  (`ShortComplex.shortExact_of_iso` along `isoMk (eqToIso h1 ‚â™‚â´ e) refl refl`). Parallelizable with the
  binding-leaf lane (different decls, same file ‚Üí serialize prover edits or assign one lane at a time).

## Coverage debt (blueprint these ‚Äî `archon dag-query unmatched` + lvb-checker MAJOR)
- **`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.WeilDivisor.sheafOf.orderAtPSubmodule`** (OcOfD.lean L1040) has NO blueprint
  `\lean{}` block. It is a prover-created helper (the fractional ideal `œÄ_P^{-n}ùí™` as
  `{g | g = 0 ‚à® -(D P) ‚â§ ord_P g}`, closure from `Ring.ordFrac_*`). Plan agent: author an informal block
  in `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex` (it is the codomain of `lem:carrierSheaf_stalk_eq_fractionalIdeal`) so the DAG
  correspondence is restored.

## Blueprint prose hygiene (planner / blueprint-writer, NOT a marker fix)
- `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex` ~L1647: `\label{lem:cokernel_sheofOf_single_add_stalkAtP_iso_kbar}` is misspelled
  ("sheofOf"). Never `\cref`'d and its `\lean{}` pin is correct, so harmless ‚Äî but rename label ‚Üí
  `lem:cokernel_sheafOf_single_add_stalkAtP_iso_kbar` for consistency when next touching the chapter.

## Stale-comment cleanup (hand to the next OcOfD prover ‚Äî review cannot edit `.lean`)
- OcOfD.lean module header "Status" block (L50‚Äì66) names 2 sorries; actual is 7 (5 new S3 stubs unlisted).
- 3-tier disclosure (L68‚Äì74) + `sheafOf` docstring (L606‚Äì633) + `sheafOf_zero` docstring (L692‚Äì700) still
  call those FULLY-IMPLEMENTED decls "Tier-3 honest typed sorry." Plus the iter-014 carryover stale comments.
  All comment-only; bundle into a single cleanup directive paired with the `Sheaf.val` migration above.

## Do NOT re-attempt
- **Do NOT re-attempt `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` as a whole iso.** It is DONE (decomposed,
  `asIso` chain). The work is now the named leaves, led by `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq`. (3 blind whole-iso
  attempts already regressed 0‚Üí2‚Üí4 pre-iter-015; the decomposition is the structural change that fixed it.)
- **Do NOT assign `cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` before its morphism `cokernel_skyscraper_hom` is a real
  (non-`sorry`) construction** ‚Äî the `isIso_of_stalkFunctor_map_iso` route is un-attemptable otherwise.

## Reusable patterns discovered (also in PROJECT_STATUS KB)
- **Deep-iso effort-break:** `haveI := <isIso-stub>; asIso <hom-stub>` makes the iso body `sorry`-free and
  relocates the depth into 2 named, provably-non-circular leaves. Canonical shape for stalkwise isos.
- **Prove the target object early:** discharge the codomain submodule (`orderAtPSubmodule`, axiom-clean)
  even while the iso landing in it is stubbed ‚Äî banks concrete reusable infra and pins the next prover's target.
